description: You grew up in the gutter, surviving by your wits. +1 to Stealth checks.
You have a price on your head. You know how to move without leaving a trail. +1 to Stealth checks.
You were raised in a secret society. You know one dark ritual and recognize cult symbols. +1 to arcane lore checks.
You trained with professional criminals. +1 to lockpicking and pickpocketing checks.
You were cast out of your homeland. You know its customs and secrets, and speak its tongue fluently.
You raised yourself on the streets after losing your family. You can find food and shelter in urban environments.
You studied under a mage before your training was cut short. +1 to arcane lore checks.
You have an eye for valuable gems and metals. +1 to appraisal checks.
You know the properties of plants, poisons, and healing herbs. +1 to nature lore checks.
You come from a fierce warrior culture. +1 to intimidation checks.
You have fought for coin across many lands. +1 to checks involving military knowledge.
You spent years at sea. +1 to navigation and weather-reading checks.
You served a temple and learned its rites. +1 to divine lore checks.
You served in an organized military force. +1 to tactics and discipline checks.
You patrolled the wilderness and know how to survive outdoors. +1 to tracking and survival checks.
You served as a forward observer. +1 to perception and awareness checks.
You traveled as a performer and storyteller. +1 to performance and social checks.
You studied at an academy or library. +1 to history and knowledge checks.
You were born to privilege. +1 to etiquette and social checks with the upper class.
You practiced medicine and surgery. +1 to healing and anatomy checks.
You lived alone in the wilderness, communing with dark forces. You know forbidden lore others fear to speak.
You were cast out for crimes real or imagined. You survive by staying unseen. +1 to disguise checks.
You were raised deep in an ancient forest. Animals do not flee from you and you can move silently through woodland.
You do not know your past, but your body remembers skills you cannot explain. Once per session, declare a useful skill you possess.
A spirit follows you and whispers warnings. Once per day, the GM must hint at an unseen danger before it strikes.
You are always running from something. You know how to find safe houses and hidden routes in any settlement.
You spent time in the fey realm and returned changed. You can sense illusions and enchantments with a successful Wis check.
Your mother was a witch. You have an uncanny ability to resist magical effects. +1 to saves vs. spells.
You obsessively gather cursed and strange objects. You can identify cursed items on sight with a successful Int check.
You seek to redeem a great evil you caused or witnessed. NPCs who know your story are compelled to hear you out.
A dark power has left a visible mark upon you. Undead and fiends hesitate before attacking you (they act last in initiative).
You were offered to a dark deity but escaped. You know the deity's rituals and weaknesses.
You were left for dead and survived. You have advantage on checks to escape bonds, restraints, and traps.
You were once a servant of light who turned away. Divine entities distrust you but you know their secrets. +1 to divine lore checks.
The supernatural is drawn to you. You can sense nearby supernatural entities within 60 ft.
You trained your body and mind through harsh discipline. You need only half normal food and water to survive.
You were raised by wolves or another predatory beast. You can communicate basic ideas to wolves and canines.
You maintained a collection of dangerous relics. You can identify magical item properties with a successful Int check.
A dark power has chosen you for a purpose yet unrevealed. Once per session, you may reroll one failed save.
Demonic blood runs in your veins. You are immune to fear effects and resist fire damage (halve fire damage received).
You earned your freedom through hard labor or daring escape. You know how to endure pain and hardship without complaint.
War or disaster drove you from your homeland. You are adept at surviving in unfamiliar territory. +1 to survival checks.
You lived outside the law. You know the criminal underworld's codes and can find fences and thieves in any town.
You have traveled far and wide, never settling. You know the roads, passes, and hidden trails between distant places.
You worked the land and know the rhythms of the seasons. You can find or grow food in rural areas with ease.
You raised and trained animals. You can calm, ride, and care for most domesticated creatures without difficulty.
You tracked and killed game in the wild. +1 to tracking and ranged attack checks in natural environments.
You know the sea and its moods. You can navigate coastal waters by stars and current, and never get seasick.
You carried out sentences as an agent of the law. People fear you on sight, granting +1 to intimidation checks.
You traded goods across long distances. You can appraise items and know current market prices in most regions.
You mastered a craft or trade. Choose a craft; you can produce quality goods and recognize fine workmanship.
You crafted bows and arrows. You can make functional bows and arrows from raw materials in the field.
You studied under a völva or seer. You can read runes and interpret omens. +1 to divination-related checks.
You built and repaired longships. You can assess a vessel's seaworthiness and make emergency repairs at sea.
You worked iron and steel. You can repair metal weapons and armor, and identify quality metalwork.
You have journeyed to distant lands and know their customs and tongues. You speak one additional language.
You are a poet and singer of heroic deeds. Your performances earn hospitality among warriors and nobles.
You descend from a celebrated hero. Your name opens doors among those who remember the old sagas.
You come from a jarl's bloodline, whether acknowledged or not. You know the politics and etiquette of the ruling class.
It is said a god or spirit touched your ancestor. Priests and oracles treat your words with unusual weight.
You stirred up trouble among the common folk for causes just or otherwise. You can incite a crowd with a successful Cha check.
You created paintings, sculptures, or other works. You can reproduce detailed images from memory and spot forgeries.
You competed in games of strength and speed. +1 to athletic checks involving feats of physical prowess.
You carried messages across dangerous terrain. You know the fastest routes between major settlements.
You excavated mines, tombs, or foundations. You can assess tunnel stability and find weak points in stone structures.
You herded livestock across long distances. You can manage large animals and know the roads between grazing lands.
You cleared vermin from buildings and sewers. You know the habits of rats, insects, and other pests, and how to kill them.
You lived by games of chance and skill. You can cheat at cards and dice without being caught on a successful Dex check.
You looted tombs for a living. You know how to locate burial sites, identify grave goods, and avoid tomb curses.
You watched for trouble from towers, rooftops, or hilltops. +1 to perception checks at range.
You studied flora and fauna in the wild. You can identify most plants, animals, and their properties.
You traveled with a wandering people. You can set up or break camp in minutes and navigate by landmarks.
You entertained crowds as an acrobat, comedian, or stage magician. +1 to performance and sleight-of-hand checks.
Deep faith defines you, even if you chose no priestly vocation. You can recite scripture and identify religious symbols and rites.
You hauled heavy loads for merchants and travelers. Your carrying capacity is 2 gear slots higher than normal.
You spent time in a dungeon or prison. You can communicate via prisoner code and know how guards think.
You repaired and modified mechanical objects. You can jury-rig broken devices and disarm mechanical traps.
You ran a market stall or small shop. You can haggle effectively and know the going rate for common goods.
You interpreted between peoples who could not understand one another. You speak two additional languages.
An irresistible urge to see what lies over the horizon drives you. You always know which direction is north and never truly get lost.
You raised the children of the wealthy elite. You know the secrets of noble households and speak with authority over the upper class.
You drove carriages through fog-filled nights. You know every road and hidden path in the region and fear no darkness.
You dressed the wealthy and powerful. You can assess someone's social standing by their clothing and create convincing disguises.
You forged iron in a smoky workshop. You can identify metal quality, repair weapons and armor, and work a forge.
You labored deep underground. You can navigate tunnels by touch alone and sense shifts in air currents that signal danger.
You kept records for merchants or officials. You can forge documents and read coded correspondence with a successful Int check.
You toiled in the kitchens of the great houses. You know poisons that can be slipped into food and can cook a meal from almost nothing.
You climbed the dark flues of manor houses. You can squeeze through tight spaces and move silently across rooftops.
You managed the staff and affairs of a great household. NPCs of servant class defer to your quiet authority.
You sold blooms on street corners and heard everything. You have contacts in the common folk of any town you visit.
You maintained the gas lamps of the city. You know the underground pipe network and can sabotage or restore gas lighting.
You crafted hats for the fashionable and affluent. You know every face in high society and can read social dynamics at a glance.
You built hulls in the fog. You can assess a vessel's structural integrity and make emergency repairs with basic tools.
You killed many times before the law caught wind of you. You know how to stage a scene, dispose of evidence, and evade pursuit.
You crafted marionettes and automatons. You can build crude mechanical constructs and understand articulated joints.
You conducted forbidden experiments in a hidden laboratory. You can identify alchemical substances and improvise strange devices.
You studied forbidden lore in secret. You know the true names of three minor demons and can draw a binding circle.
You sold worthless cures to desperate people. You are a masterful liar; detecting your deceptions requires a DC 15 Wis check.
You prepared the dead for burial. You are immune to fear caused by corpses, undead, or death imagery.
You read cards, bones, and stars for paying clients. Once per session, ask the GM one yes-or-no question about the current situation.
